voices.name: Grandma 💕
voices.message: My sweet Nana, you are the light of our family. Grandma loves you more than words can say.

voices.name: Grandma 💕
voices.message: Another special blessing from your grandma. May this year bring you everything your heart desires.

voices.name: Anydupe
voices.message: Nana! You're such a beautiful soul. Never change who you are. The world is better because you're in it.

voices.name: Big Bro Nicosh
voices.message: Nana, I'll always be here — to protect you, to annoy you, to love you. That's what big brothers do. Forever and always.

one.message: Before you could walk, you were already a queen. These little moments are where your story began.

photos.caption: The day you made our world brighter, little princess.
Little feet, giant heart. And the most beautiful smile.

two.title: The Family Kingdom
two.subtitle: Everyone who loves you has a message.

timeline.title: The Queen's Words
timeline.description: My sweet Nana, you are the greatest gift life ever gave me. Watching you grow fills my heart with pride every single day.

timeline.title: Your Guardian
timeline.description: I'll always be here — to protect you, to annoy you, to love you. That's what big brothers do. Forever and always.

timeline.title: Wisdom & Love
timeline.description: My dear child, you have a light inside you that can never be dimmed. Shine bright, always. I love you.

timeline.title: Your Friend
timeline.description: Nana! You're such a special soul. Never change who you are. The world is better because you're in it.

letter: You are the heart of this family. The one who reminds us all what love looks like.
Never stop being you — because you are absolutely perfect exactly as you are.
With all the love a big brother can hold,
three.finalSurprise: Check under your pillow — there's a little surprise waiting.

easterEggs.message: Every star is a wish for you.
